original_image_tags: A faded, discolored document page with a large, greenish-blue stain or smudge covering much of the surface, obscuring the typed content underneath. There are two punch holes at the top. A handwritten or stamped note is visible at the bottom.

elements.description: A faint, faded blue ink stamp located at the bottom center, oriented upside down. The text is difficult to read clearly but includes legible words: 'REC'D - TOI SON'S OFFICE', 'received by', 'Aug 13 5PM', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'F.B.I.', and 'U.S. Mailing Office 54 PM 52'.
A faint, faded red ink stamp located at the bottom right corner, oriented upside down. The text is difficult to read but appears to say 'REC'D AUG 29 1945'.

judge.reason: Description A describes a large greenish-blue stain and punch holes, while Description B describes two distinct upside-down ink stamps with specific quoted text, indicating they are describing different visual content.
